title: Fallen Kingdom Mod
body:
Fallen Kingdom Mod focuses on various items and mobs to the game from the Fallen Kingdom series, down from Rising Kingdom all the way to Dragonhearted.

There will be a lot more stuff in release, wait patiently.

(I wanted to note that mob(s) do not spawn naturally as of now)

[DarkPeasant's Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/thedarkpeasant), this project would have not existed without him!

<details>
<summary>Mobs (Info)</summary>

![Pig-Boss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10bd70ee91088b673356bd779d9737d3a53b3ee6_0.webp)

</details>





<details>
<summary>Questions and Answers</summary>

Q: Can I port this mod to Bedrock Edition?

A: You can just play on Java Edition, y'know?





Q: Will there be updates?

A: Yes, I just need time to experiment and practice.





Q: Can I fight the Pig-Mech from the 'Dragonhearted' music video?

A: Yes, he'll be in one of the coming updates.




Q: Can I use this for my Mob Battles video?

A: Yes, I love seeing my work in videos, I encourage it!




Q: Why is the update taking so long?

A: I needed to take breaks mentally, complicated things like mod-making can be really hard for me, especially when I work alone.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

- Grungus: Main Modeller (, Coder as of in upcoming Release,) and Animator (Beta and Release build)
 
- JoTurtleGuy: Animator (Formely, Beta build)
 
- TheDarkPeasant: Coder, helped lift the project off the ground (Formerly, Beta build)
 
- CaptainSparklez: Creator of Fallen Kingdom

</details>
